title: 20 Sets DIY 3D House Stickers Kit Non-Toxic & Safe 3D Miniature Scene Therapy for Kids and Adults, Stress Relief Sticker Scenes with Tweezers Creative Fun & Reusable DIY Sticker Therapy Kit for age 3+
features: 3D miniature worlds: 20 3D scenes all in one set, intricately designed miniature worlds – from bakery to hamburger shop. Numerous exquisite elements for craft enthusiasts and creative minds. Crafted with HD printing and cut precision, bring vivid colours and crisp details.

Safe Creative Play: Made with non-toxic paper and PET material, can use it with confidence. Innovative die-cutting process makes it easy to peel off stickers. Reusable stickers creating a reassuring handmade experience. Equipped with 2 stainless steel tweezers for precision handling.

Immersive decompression: Soothing emotions and releasing stress through the collage process of focus and color therapy. Get rid of boring work，life and anxiety，enter an immersive creative journey. Release negative energy, allow your creativity to freely express itself.

Limitless creative artifact: Provides rich elements, can be used on scene card, or DIY different combinations to mix various elements and inspire creative inspiration. Support repeated creation on smooth surfaces such as phone/tablet/laptop, home decor scrapbooking stickers，decorate your life with unique artworks.

Full age growth gift: Children aged 3-12 develop spatial perception through collage, teenagers enhance focus through micro landscaping, and adults gain creative healing time. 3D Miniature Scene Stickers are best choice for birthday, Christmas, festivals, party gifts, ideal gift for kids and adults of 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9,10...

Choose your favorite theme, use tweezers or hands to remove the corresponding sticker, and stick it on the scene card. You can refer to the placement diagram or decide where you want to place it yourself. What if I can't find the sticker? For independent themes, there are usually 2 separate stickers and scene cards together. For Sticker Book Set, scene card and stickers are separate. Each scene has 2 stickers page which can find in the upper right corner of the theme scene cardboard. What should I do if I lack tweezers, stickers or the product damaged by logistics？ Our products are carefully hand-assembled and thorough checks before leaving our facility. However, on rare occasions, something might occasionally be missed. If you encounter any issues, you can contact our sales team through Amazon for assistance.
